source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - hConnect
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning



🎯 What You Will Do

As a Backend Engineer, your code will form the foundation that protects and connects the digital identity of users around the world.

 - Design and Develop Global Authentication Platform: Build and maintain the core backend systems and high-availability infrastructure of the hConnect platform.

 - Integrate with Diverse Identity Systems: Develop and extend modules that integrate with national electronic ID (eID) systems and external identity services worldwide.

 - Build Scalable Systems: Ensure stability while progressively improving systems to handle future traffic growth and feature expansion.

 - Design Flexible and Scalable APIs: Develop and maintain reliable APIs that enable seamless integration with internal services and external partners.

 - Foster a Strong Code Culture: Collaborate with teammates through code reviews, write clean and maintainable code, and help establish a culture of engineering excellence.




🧠 WHO YOU ARE




QUALIFICATIONS

We value skills and potential over a simple list of technologies. We are looking for someone with the following capabilities:

 - Proactive Problem-Solving: Ability to go beyond assigned tasks, understand business goals, propose better solutions, and drive improvements independently.

 - Navigating Ambiguity: Comfortable finding the best path forward in undefined situations and collaborating with teammates to define solutions.

 - Deep Technical Curiosity: Goes beyond simply using frameworks; explores how technologies work at their core and makes them their own.

 - Transparent Communication and Collaboration: Shares progress and blockers openly with the team, listens actively to peers, and works toward better outcomes together.

 - Strong Fundamentals: Solid understanding of Node.js and TypeScript, with at least 2 years of backend development experience.


PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - Depth in Specific Technologies: Strong CS fundamentals and hands-on mastery of at least one technology.

 - Authentication Protocol Experience: Practical experience with OpenID Connect, OAuth 2.0, JWT, and Access Token flows.

 - 0-to-1 Product Experience: Built early-stage products and learned from scaling them to meet business goals.

 - Understanding of Client Environments: Especially experience addressing compatibility challenges across browsers and mobile platforms.

 - Commitment to Code Quality: Experience with test automation and efforts to continuously improve code quality.

 - Large-Scale Traffic Handling: Designing and operating architectures that support high-volume traffic.

 - API Gateway / PaaS /

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning




🎯 WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a returning global talent, you’ll play a key role in Hopae’s growth across product, engineering, operations, marketing, and business.
We welcome applications from overseas professionals who want to bring global experience, diverse thinking, and a high bar of excellence to our Seoul HQ.

Depending on your background, you may:

 - Join one of our global functions (Engineering, Product, Marketing, Operations, or Business)

 - Lead or contribute to cross-border projects with our teams in Europe and North America

 - Help expand Hopae’s presence in regulated or high-impact markets

 - Build systems and processes that connect Korea to the global tech ecosystem




🧠 WHO YOU ARE

 - Korean or global professional returning (or planning to return) to Korea

 - Fluent in English; Korean proficiency is a plus but not mandatory

 - Thrive in high-performance, fast-moving environments

 - Understands both Korean and global business contexts

 - Excited to work in an async, global, and impact-driven culture

 - Passionate about building something with long-term global potential


⚡️ FAST FACTS

 - 💰 $6.5M+ raised from top global investors

 - 📦 2.6M+ downloads of our sd-jwt-js library

 - 🌍 10+ nationalities across 3 hubs

 - 🔬 82 eID research projects completed

 - 🌐 3 projects accepted into the OpenWallet Foundation




🎁 BENEFITS & CULTURE

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Remote-friendly work model

 - Real ownership from Day 1

 - High-impact, global product

 - Multicultural, respectful team




🧭 INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. Recruiter Intro Call (30 min) – Get to know Hopae

 2. Functional or Technical Interview (45 min) – Dive into your skills

 3. Culture Fit Conversation (45 min) – Collaboration & alignment

 4. Offer 🎉

Note: The process may vary slightly depending on the role.

source_jobs.title: [High Growth/Global Startup] Operation Manager
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning




🎯 WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Design and build AI-powered workflows that automate entity compliance tracking, deadline monitoring, document routing, and intercompany agreement management across 20+ jurisdictions

 - Own the global entity infrastructure — incorporation pipelines, banking setup, director management, registered agent renewals, and annual filing calendars

 - Create the single source of truth for all entity data, replacing scattered tools with a centralized, always-current system

 - Prioritize ruthlessly — identify the highest-leverage bottlenecks, build solutions that matter most, and know what not to build

 - Support executive decision-making with fast, structured research and project execution on high-priority initiatives

 - Establish ops policies and documentation that let a lean team scale without adding headcount
   
   

🧠 Who You Are



 - You have 3+ years in operations, legal ops, or business management — ideally in a fast-scaling startup or tech company

 - You think in systems, not tasks — you're not satisfied until the process runs without you

 - You're comfortable building with AI tools — you've used or are eager to work with tools like Claude, automation platforms, or agent frameworks to eliminate manual work

 - You can navigate ambiguity — you don't wait for perfect information to start building

 - You have strong financial and compliance literacy — budgets, intercompany agreements, and multi-jurisdiction filing requirements don't intimidate you

 - You communicate with precision — your output is always clear, structured, and easy to act on

 - You're fluent in Korean and English — written and verbal

source_jobs.title: Senior CSM - Implementation & Onboarding Lead
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning



🎯 What You Will Do

As a Senior CSM – Implementation & Onboarding Lead, you own the client journey from signed contract to successful go-live — and build the systems that make every onboarding after yours faster. As the first senior hire in this function, you define the processes the team inherits — with a clear path to team lead as we scale.

 - Own onboarding end-to-end — kickoff through go-live — driving alignment across Product, Engineering, Legal, and Sales

 - Be the primary client contact during implementation: route requests, hold SLAs, monitor health and NPS, and surface friction before it escalates

 - Build CS playbooks and deploy AI-powered automation (Zapier, Make, LLM workflows) to reduce time-to-value and scale without headcount

 - Work cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, and Product — handoffs, case studies, and roadmap input



🧠 Who You Are

 - 7+ years of experience, with at least 3 in Customer Success, Implementation, or Technical Onboarding in B2B SaaS

 - Proven managing complex, multi-stakeholder onboarding projects — you own timelines, surface blockers, and drive go-lives

 - Technical enough to hold your own with engineers and enterprise clients — API integrations, documentation, bridging both worlds

 - Fluent in NPS, health scoring and hands-on with automation tools (Zapier, Make, n8n) and CS tooling (HubSpot, Intercom, Notion, Jira, Gainsight)

 - Fluent in English; French is a strong advantage — based in Paris / Île-de-France, async-first, autonomous, and outcomes-driven

 - Background in identity, KYC, or regulated tech is a strong plus
   
   


⚡️ FAST FACTS

 - 💰 $6.5M+ raised from top global investors

 - 📦 2.6M+ downloads of our sd-jwt-js library

 - 🌍 10+ nationalities across 3 hubs

 - 🔬 82 eID research projects completed

 - 🌐 3 projects accepted into the OpenWallet Foundation

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning




🎯 WHAT YOU WILL DO

At Hopae, Product Managers sit at the heart of everything we build. You'll work closely with engineering, design, research, and business teams to shape products that define how the world verifies identity — at scale, across borders, and without compromise.

We're hiring PMs across Hopae.

hConnect — our core API product that lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single integration. PMs here own the developer-facing product experience, shape how enterprises and IDV providers connect to global eID systems, and drive adoption across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming verticals.

Research — our frontier team pushing the boundaries of digital identity. The current focus is building a hardware-based, in-person identification solution — a genuinely hard, genuinely new problem at the intersection of physical and digital trust. PMs here work in a more exploratory, zero-to-one environment.

Across both teams, you will:

 - Own your product area end-to-end — from discovery and roadmap to launch and iteration

 - Translate complex regulatory, technical, and user requirements into clear, shippable specs

 - Define success metrics and hold yourself accountable to them

 - Work closely with engineers, designers, and legal/compliance to ship features that are both technically sound and commercially meaningful

 - Partner with Sales and Business Development to understand what customers need — and what the market is ready for

 - Communicate priorities clearly and push back when needed — you are the decision-maker for your surface area

 - Represent the voice of the customer internally, and the voice of the product externally
   
   


🧠 WHO YOU ARE

You've shipped real products, own your decisions, and thrive without a playbook. You think in first principles, communicate with precision across time zones, and are genuinely excited about the future of digital identity.

 - You have a B2B SaaS background, can hold your own in a technical conversation, and understand how product decisions move deals.

 - You're comfortable in 0→1 territory — hardware meets software, experiments over sprints, structure built from scratch.

 - We're hiring across levels. Associate/Mid-level PMs (1–4 years) bring hunger and sharp thinking. Senior PMs (5+ years) set the bar for everyone who follows.




⚡️ FAST FACTS

 - 💰 $6.5M+ raised from top global investors

 - 📦 2.6M+ downloads of our sd-jwt-js library

 - 🌍 10+ nationalities across 3 hubs

 - 🔬 82 eID research projects completed

 - 🌐 3 projects accepted into the OpenWallet Foundation




🎁 BE

🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning




🎯 WHAT YOU'LL DO

As a React Native Product Engineer on hConnect, you don't just build features — you own the mobile product experience end-to-end. From problem definition to deployment, you're the person who makes sure our mobile product solves real user problems and runs reliably at global scale.

 - Design and develop mobile products using React Native and TypeScript across diverse countries, user environments, and authentication flows

 - Own the full product lifecycle — problem definition, requirements, implementation, deployment, operations, and iteration

 - Shape the mobile experience for global identity verification — secure, trustworthy, and built for real users

 - Move fast: understand the problem, identify what matters now, build, ship, and improve

 - Collaborate closely with designers and the Product team to raise the bar on direction and quality

 - Leverage AI tools actively as a core part of your development workflow — not as an afterthought

 - Go beyond your immediate scope when the product needs it — you solve what needs solving




🧠 WHO YOU ARE

You care more about solving the right problem than perfecting the wrong one. You don't wait for complete specs — you define the scope, make the call, and ship.

 - Hands-on experience building real mobile apps with React Native and TypeScript

 - Product Engineer mindset — you push for better solutions, not just cleaner implementations

 - High autonomy, high accountability — no micromanagement needed

 - Comfortable making decisions in ambiguity — no perfect plan? You find the path anyway

 - Active AI user — you treat tools like Claude Code or Codex as productivity multipliers

Nice to have:

 - 0→1 product experience — built something from idea to launch

 - App Store / Play Store operations — submissions, OTA updates, crash handling

 - Backend or full-stack experience

 - B2B, SaaS, or identity/auth domain experience


⚡️ FAST FACTS

 - 💰 $6.5M+ raised from top global investors

 - 📦 2.6M+ downloads of our sd-jwt-js library

 - 🌍 10+ nationalities across 3 hubs

 - 🔬 82 eID research projects completed

 - 🌐 3 projects accepted into the OpenWallet Foundation




🎁 BENEFITS & CULTURE

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Remote-friendly work model

 - Real ownership from Day 1

 - High-impact, global product

 - Multicultural, respectful team




🧭 INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. Recruiter Intro Call (30 min) – Get to know Hopae

 2. Functional or Technical Interview (45 min) – Dive into your skills

 3. Culture Fit Conversation (45 min) – Collaboration & alignment

 4. Offer 🎉

Note: The process may vary slightly depen

source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning



🎯 What You Will Do

 

As a Software Engineer, your code will form the foundation that protects and connects the digital identity of users around the world.

 

 - Design and Develop Global Authentication Platform: Build and maintain the core backend systems and high-availability infrastructure of the hConnect platform.

 - Integrate with Diverse Identity Systems: Develop and extend modules that integrate with national electronic ID (eID) systems and external identity services worldwide.

 - Build Scalable Systems: Ensure stability while progressively improving systems to handle future traffic growth and feature expansion.

 - Design Flexible and Scalable APIs: Develop and maintain reliable APIs that enable seamless integration with internal services and external partners.

 - Foster a Strong Code Culture: Collaborate with teammates through code reviews, write clean and maintainable code, and help establish a culture of engineering excellence.

 

🧠 Who You Are

 

Qualifications

 

We value skills and potential over a simple list of technologies. We are looking for someone with the following capabilities:

 

 - Proactive Problem-Solving: Ability to go beyond assigned tasks, understand business goals, propose better solutions, and drive improvements independently.

 - Navigating Ambiguity: Comfortable finding the best path forward in undefined situations and collaborating with teammates to define solutions.

 - Deep Technical Curiosity: Goes beyond simply using frameworks; explores how technologies work at their core and makes them their own.

 - Transparent Communication and Collaboration: Shares progress and blockers openly with the team, listens actively to peers, and works toward better outcomes together.

 - Strong Fundamentals: Solid understanding of Node.js and TypeScript, with at least 2 years of backend development experience.

 

Preferred Qualifications

 

 - Depth in Specific Technologies: Strong CS fundamentals and hands-on mastery of at least one technology.

 - Authentication Protocol Experience: Practical experience with OpenID Connect, OAuth 2.0, JWT, and Access Token flows.

 - 0-to-1 Product Experience: Built early-stage products and learned from scaling them to meet business goals.

 - Understanding of Client Environments: Especially experience addressing compatibility challenges across browsers and mobile platforms.

 - Commitment to Code Quality: Experience with test automation and efforts to continuously improve code quality.

 - Large-Scale Traffic Handling: Designing and operating architectures that support high-volume traffic.

 - API

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning



🌍 About Hopae

 

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

 

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

 

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.

 

💡 Why You’ll Love It Here

 

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning

 

🎯 What You Will Do

 

Most finance roles at a startup mean cleaning up someone else's mess. This one is different — Hopae's books are clean, our investors are global, and we need someone who wants to build something lasting, not just maintain it.

 

As Finance Manager / Controller, you own the financial infrastructure of a company operating across four countries — with direct visibility to leadership and real influence over how we scale.

 

 - Own the full accounting cycle — month-end close, journal entries, reconciliations, and financial statements that are always investor-ready

 - Manage AP, AR, payroll coordination, expense workflows, cash flow, banking relationships, and treasury operations

 - Maintain a clean, auditable general ledger across multiple entities and currencies

 - Coordinate external accountants, auditors, and tax advisors across jurisdictions — ensuring statutory, tax, and regulatory compliance

 - Build the financial controls, policies, and tooling (ERP, billing, expense) that the next 50 people at Hopae will rely on

 

🧠 Who You Are

 

 - 5+ years in accounting or finance at controller, senior accountant, or accounting manager level — strong GAAP and/or IFRS

source_jobs.description:

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning



🎯 What You Will Do

Hopae's network of IDV providers is one of our most strategic assets. As Partner Development Manager, you own the relationships that turn that network into revenue — activating partners, building joint go-to-market motions, and making sure both sides win.

 - Own the full partner lifecycle with IDV providers — from activation and enablement to co-sell execution and growth

 - Build joint GTM strategies with partners: define targets, identify opportunities, and create the conditions for deals to close

 - Generate and grow pipeline through the partner channel — you're accountable to revenue, not just relationship health

 - Run structured business reviews (QBRs) and track KPIs across volume, revenue, and partner performance

 - Work closely with Sales, Product, and Legal to remove blockers and keep partners moving

 - Be the voice of the partner internally — surface insights that shape how Hopae builds and positions its product



🧠 Who You Are

 - 3–5 years in B2B SaaS, identity, or privacy-first tech — you understand how the ecosystem works

 - Experienced in partner or channel roles where your success was measured in pipeline and revenue, not just activity

 - You get the IDV value chain — how providers, platforms, and end clients fit together and where Hopae plays

 - A natural relationship builder who earns trust quickly — with partners and internal stakeholders alike

 - Outcome-driven and self-directed — you set your own targets and hold yourself to them

 - Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus given our global partner network
   
   


⚡️ FAST FACTS

 - 💰 $6.5M+ raised from top global investors

 - 📦 2.6M+ downloads of our sd-jwt-js library

 - 🌍 10+ nationalities across 3 hubs

 - 🔬 82 eID research projects completed

 - 🌐 3 projects accepted into the OpenWallet Foundation




🎁 BENEFITS & CULTURE

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Remote-friendly work model

 - Real ownership from Day 1

 - High-impact, global product

 - Multicultural, respectful team




🧭 INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. Recruiter Intro Call (30 min) – Get to know Hopae

 2. Functional or Technical Interview (45 min) – Dive into your skills

 3. Culture Fit Conversation (45 min) – Collaboration & alignment

 4. Offer 🎉

Note: The process may vary slightly depending on the role.

 - Execute creative outreach: Design and run multi-channel prospecting across phone, email, LinkedIn, and beyond to book qualified meetings and generate pipeline

 - Own your pipeline: Maintain strong CRM discipline, track activity consistently, and contribute to predictable quarterly growth

 - Stay tight with Revenue: Align regularly with Account Executives to prioritize accounts, sharpen messaging, and accelerate deals

 - Improve the machine: Test and optimize the tools, workflows, and channels the Revenue and Marketing teams rely on

 - Feed the team: Bring prospect insights back to sharpen positioning, messaging, and campaign performance



🧠 Who You Are

 - A hunter — proactive, persistent, and energized by creating opportunities from nothing

 - Disciplined prospector with the strategic instinct to balance high-volume outreach with thoughtful personalization

 - Comfortable with modern sales tooling — HubSpot, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and whatever comes next

 - Humble and coachable — you test new approaches, learn fast, and raise the bar on yourself

 - Fluent in German, with full working fluency in English

 - Nice to have: experience in IDV, FinTech, Cybersecurity, or complex B2B SaaS

 - Bonus: fluency in an additional European language

source_jobs.title: Head of Research
source_jobs.description:
🌍 ABOUT HOPAE

At Hopae, we're building the world's most trusted digital identity platform — private, secure, and built for real life. We believe identity should be in your control — not locked behind outdated systems or centralized gatekeepers.

Our product, Hopae Connect, lets businesses verify real people across borders through a single API — no need to build country-by-country integrations themselves. Our technology powers instant, privacy-first verification across fintech, credentials, supply chain, and gaming — for IDV providers, e-signature platforms, and enterprises who need identity to just work, everywhere.

Backed by top global investors, Hopae operates across Seoul, Paris, Luxembourg, and San Francisco, bringing together exceptional talent from over 10 nationalities. We move fast, think globally, and build products that define the future of identity.




💡 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Global DNA: Work with exceptional peers across Seoul, Paris, and San Francisco

 - High Impact: Build technology shaping the global trust and identity landscape

 - Ownership Culture: No micromanagement — full trust, full accountability

 - Elite Standards: Work fast, learn fast, and grow with world-class peers

 - Inclusive & Respectful: 10+ nationalities, diverse perspectives, one vision

 - Growth Mindset: Access mentorship, leadership visibility, and continuous learning




🎯 WHAT YOU WILL DO

Digital identity is one of the most complex, fragmented, and consequential infrastructure problems in the world. As Head of Research at Hopae, you lead the team exploring what comes next — from government eID systems to hardware-based, in-person identification — and you translate that exploration into products and partnerships that matter.

This is a leadership role with real scope. You'll set the research agenda, grow and lead a team, and sit at the intersection of technology, regulation, and product.

 - Define and own Hopae's research roadmap across two tracks: eID and government identity systems globally, and hardware-based in-person identification solutions

 - Lead, grow, and mentor a team of researchers — setting standards, creating focus, and building a culture of rigorous, outcome-oriented inquiry

 - Translate research findings into actionable product direction — working closely with Engineering, Product, and Legal to move from insight to implementation

 - Monitor the global identity landscape — standards bodies, regulatory developments, emerging technologies, and competitive dynamics — and keep Hopae ahead of the curve

 - Represent Hopae externally in relevant industry forums, working groups, and standards organizations (including OpenWallet Foundation and eID authorities)

 - Partner with Business Development to turn research assets into commercial opportunities — positioning Hopae's expertise as a competitive differentiator


🧠 WHO YOU ARE

 - 8+ years of experience in identity, digital trust, cryptography, or a closely related technical domain — with at least 3 years in a research leadership or team lead capacity

 - Deep knowledge of eID ecosystems — government identity programs, standards (W3C, ISO, ETSI), and regulatory frameworks across multiple jurisdictions

 - Hands-on experience or strong familiarity with hardware-based identification technologies — NFC, biometrics, secure elements, or related domains

 - A builder and a leader — you set the research direction, develop your team, and drive work from hypothesis to real-world applicability

 - Comfortable operating at the frontier — where requirements are unclear, precedents are few, and the ability to create structure from ambiguity is essential

 - Strong external presence — you've engaged with standards bodies, published research, or represented an organization in industry forums

 - Based in Luxembourg; fluent in English — additional European languages are a plus
   
   


⚡️ FAST FACTS

 - 💰 $6.5M+ raised from top global investors

 - 📦 2.6M+ downloads of our sd-jwt

notes: High-growth startup with a strong focus on engineering and product development.
